structural_differences_summary.sizing: main runs flat per-strategy size (mostly 1-3 contracts via internal v4 confidence sizing); v18 Option 4b applies Recipe B 10/4/1 tiers gated on V18 proba
structural_differences_summary.simulator: main uses backtest_mes_et.py (legacy with §8.25 phantom contract-roll bug); v18 uses simulator_trade_through.py (corrected)
structural_differences_summary.candidate_stream: main fires DE3 candidates with default config gates (selected_filters=[], so essentially raw DE3 candidates); v18 corpus is friend-rule + V18 stacker @ thr 0.60
structural_differences_summary.friend_rule: main does NOT apply friend's family-aware same-side rule at backtest level (no RA/AF in this run anyway, but DE3+DE3 stacks are allowed by main's run_de3_backtest.py); v18 corpus filters by allowed_by_friend_rule=True
structural_differences_summary.single_position: main backtest_mes_et allows multiple concurrent legs per its own internal logic; v18 enforces strict single-position via vectorized walk
